headline: Heavy Transportation Equipment Stocks Q1 In Review: PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) Vs Peers
summary: Looking back on heavy transportation equipment stocks’ Q1 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) and its peers.
